{{Quote|The princess of the Titterbugs!|Gorph guard, announcing another candidate for Prince Vork's hand in marriage|<ref name="PL" />}}
The '''Titterbugs''' were a [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Insectoid/Legends|insectoids]] who lived on the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon of Endor]]. They were small beings with four [[Limb/Legends|legs]], two arms, and—at least in some members—an orange [[Exoskeleton|carapace]]. Their heads were large in relation to the rest of the body, the site of two large [[Eye/Legends|eyes]], a wide [[Mouth/Legends|mouth]], two antennae, and a full head of [[Hair/Legends|hair]]. Titterbugs recognized some members of their kind as [[Prince/Legends|princesses]], and in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], [[Titterbug princess|one such Titterbug]] was considered as a potential wife for [[Vork (Gorph)|Vork]], prince of a tribe of [[Gorph/Legends|Gorphs]] who lived on Endor.

==Biology and appearance==
{{Quote|Oh, I like her, Ma!|Prince Vork, upon seeing the princess of the Titterbugs|<ref name="PL" />}}
[[File:Titterbug_princess_gets_ousted.jpg|thumb|left|Titterbugs were much smaller than Gorphs.]]
Titterbugs were a [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Insectoid/Legends|insectoids]]<ref name="PL" /> who stood roughly 0.33 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] tall.<ref name="height" /> A Titterbug's body was divided into three segments: a head, a thorax, and an abdomen. Six [[Limb/Legends|limbs]] grew from this bottommost section; members of the species stood upright on four segmented legs with two toes per foot, while another two limbs with three fingers served as fine manipulators. At least some Titterbugs had an orange [[Exoskeleton|carapace]] with reddish-brown markings.<ref name="PL" />

The thorax supported a thin neck, upon which was perched a large, wide head. At least for some members of the species, the face was pale from the chin to just above the upper lip. A Titterbug could purse his or her [[Mouth/Legends|mouth]] into a small opening or a wide grin that bared large, pale [[Tooth/Legends|teeth]]. The remainder of the head was colored the same hue as the carapace of the body. Titterbugs had two large, yellow [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] with black pupils, and at least some members of the species sported eyelashes. Titterbugs had [[Hair/Legends|hair]]; reddish brown was one possible color. Two jointed, black antennae poked from the hair atop the head.<ref name="PL" />

==Society and culture==
Some Titterbugs had high-pitched voices. The species included at least one [[Prince/Legends|princess]] among their ranks, and she indicated her status by wearing a [[Gold/Legends|gold]]-colored [[Crown/Legends|crown]]. They had relations with other groups, such as the rotund species known as [[Gorph/Legends|Gorphs]].<ref name="PL" />

==History==
{{Quote|No, no, not good enough!|Queen Slugga, just prior to casting the princess of the Titterbugs into the pit|<ref name="PL" />}}
In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]],<ref name="BTM">''[[Star Wars: Behind the Magic]]''</ref> a [[Titterbug princess|princess of the Titterbugs]] was selected as a candidate to marry [[Vork (Gorph)|Vork]], the prince of a rotund species known as Gorphs. His mother, [[Queen/Legends|Queen]] [[Slugga]], had expressed a desire to find a princess who was wealthy and well-bred. At the [[Gorphs' grotto]], that Titterbug joined other candidates, including the [[Mudgub princess|princess]] of the [[Mudgub]]s, just outside the audience chamber. The Mudgub princess was brought through the doors first, but soon enough, the Titterbug princess was picked up and carried into the chamber by a pair of bouncing Gorph guards. Prince Vork seemed pleased with her, but Slugga did not. She ordered the princess thrown into a large hole in the grotto's floor known as "the pit." Despite her fate, the Titterbug princess giggled the whole time.<ref name="PL" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Titterbugs were created by writer [[Paul Dini]] for the [[Ewoks (television series)|''Ewoks'']] animated television series. They appeared in the episode "[[Princess Latara]]," which first aired on [[September 20]], [[1986]].<ref name="Insider">{{InsiderCite|27|A Star Wars CELibration|A ''Star Wars'' CELibration}}</ref>

==Appearances==
*{{Ewoks|Princess Latara}} {{1st}}
